name: Iress Limited
analysis: IRE has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 38% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$6.3000, stop A$5.6826, target A$7.1500 (1.38:1) — then trail it.
